meta.title: mybetrecord - Wasanni Betting Tracker, ROI & Kelly Stake Ledger
meta.description: Bibiyar kowane fare a cikin littatafan tarbiyya guda ɗaya. ROI, yawan amfanin ƙasa, hannun jari na Kelly, CLV, karkatar da daidaito, da fitarwa - an gina shi don mutanen da suka yi fare zuwa lamba.
meta.pricingDescription: Littafin yin fare na wasanni kyauta tare da cikakkun fasali, ko Pro don shiga mara iyaka na yau da kullun akan kusan $ 5 USD kowane wata a cikin kuɗin gida.

home.heroTitle: Mabiyan fare wasanni ga mutanen da suka yi fare zuwa lamba
home.heroLead: Dakatar da juggling maƙunsar rubutu. Shiga kowane wager, waƙa da ROI da yawan amfanin ƙasa, girman gungumen azaba tare da Kelly, kuma duba inda gefen ku ke rayuwa da gaske.
home.section1Title: Daga hargitsin maƙunsar rubutu zuwa ingantaccen littafai
home.section1Sub: Yawancin masu cin amana sun zarce ƙa'idodin bayanin kula da shafuka na Excel. mybetrecord yana ba ku wuri guda don yin rikodin fare, daidaita sakamako, da karanta lambobin aiki na gaskiya.
home.featureOddsDesc: Tsarukan Decimal, Amurkawa, juzu'i, da tsarin Asiya - an daidaita su ta atomatik don haka rahotanni su tsaya daidai.
home.featureKellyDesc: Saita bayanan banki da bayanan gefe; sami shawarar girman hannun jari bisa ma'aunin Kelly.
home.featureRoiTitle: ROI, yawan amfanin ƙasa & karkatar da daidaito
home.featureRoiDesc: Adadin yajin aiki, jujjuyawa, riba ta wata-wata, da madaidaitan ma'auni don daidaita fare.
home.featureBreakdownsDesc: Yanke aikin ta hanyar wasanni, nau'in fare, mai ba da shawara, ko mai yin littafi don nemo inda kuka ci nasara da zubewa.
home.featureClvDesc: Yi rikodin rashin daidaituwa na rufewa kuma auna CLV - sigina mai ƙarfi fiye da sakamakon ɗan gajeren lokaci kaɗai.
home.featureExportDesc: Zazzage CSV, Excel, ko JSON. Ƙirƙirar maɓallan API don rubutun da aiki da kai.
home.pricingSub: Kowane fasalin da ke ƙasa yana cikin tsare-tsaren biyu. Pro yana cire hular rajista ta yau da kullun - kusan $ 5 USD kowace wata a cikin kuɗin gida.
home.pricingFreeLimit: Har zuwa fare 5 da yawa 5 kowace rana
home.pricingProLimit: Fare mara iyaka da yawa kowace rana
home.pricingFeatureLedger: Cikakken jagorar fare - abubuwan da suka faru, zaɓaɓɓu, gungumomi, sakamako & P/L
home.pricingFeatureOdds: Duk nau'ikan rashin daidaituwa - ƙima, Amurkawa, juzu'i & Asiya
home.pricingFeatureTypes: Kowane nau'in fare - nasara, kowace hanya, kan-ƙarƙasa, da yawa & naƙasassu
home.pricingFeatureKelly: Girman hannun jari na Kelly daga bankin ku & bayyana gefen
home.pricingFeatureReports: ROI, yawan amfanin ƙasa, ƙimar yajin aiki & lanƙwan ãdalci
home.pricingFeatureBreakdowns: Rushewar ta hanyar wasanni, nau'in fare, mai ba da shawara & mai yin littattafai
home.pricingFeatureEdge: Samfurin & rashin daidaituwa na sirri tare da gefen kowace naúrar
home.pricingFeatureSettlement: Adadin fitar da tsabar kudi & ragi na nasara akan masu nasara
home.pricingFeatureApi: Maɓallan API don rubutun & aiki da kai
home.pricingFeatureLocale: Fassarar harshe da yawa & goyan bayan yankin lokaci
home.pricingNote: Pro shine kusan $5 USD kowace wata, ana nunawa a cikin kuɗin gida. Soke kowane lokaci daga Saituna.
home.section2Sub: Koyi lissafin da ke bayan ma'auni - sannan ku bi su a cikin littafin ku.
home.blogRoiDesc: Lambobin kanun labarai guda biyu, galibi suna ruɗewa. Ku san wanene ya amsa tambayar.
home.blogKellyDesc: Yadda mafi kyawun girman gungumen azaba ke aiki - kuma dalilin da yasa yawancin masu cin amana ke amfani da juzu'in cikakken Kelly.
home.blogSpreadsheetDesc: Lokacin da Excel ya isa - kuma lokacin da keɓaɓɓen littatafai yana adana sa'o'i da kurakurai.
home.faqTrackerQ: Menene mai bin diddigin fare wasanni?
home.faqTrackerA: Ƙimar da aka tsara don kowane wager - hannun jari, rashin daidaito, sakamako, da riba - tare da ROI ta atomatik, yawan amfanin ƙasa, da rugujewa maimakon tsarin maƙunsar bayanai na hannu.
home.faqOddsQ: Wadanne nau'ikan rashin daidaito ne ake tallafawa?
home.faqOddsA: Decimal, American, fractional, Hong Kong, Malaysian, da Indonesian. Ana adana duk fare tare da ƙima na ƙima don bayar da rahoto.
home.faqKellyQ: Ta yaya rabon Kelly yake aiki a nan?
home.faqKellyA: Shigar da rashin daidaituwa na sirri akan fare. Tare da bankroll da Kelly multiplier saita a cikin saituna, app ɗin yana ba da shawarar gungumen azaba dangane da gefen da aka bayyana.
home.faqExportQ: Zan iya fitarwa ko amfani da API?
home.faqExportA: Ee - CSV, Excel, da JSON fitarwa tare da maɓallan API don samun damar shirye-shirye zuwa rikodin ku.
home.faqTipsterQ: Shin wannan sabis ɗin tikwici ne?
home.faqTipsterA: A'a. mybetrecord shine rikodi da nazari kawai. Ba mu sayar da zaɓe ko alƙawarin riba.
home.rg: Cca mai alhakin. Ya kamata yin fare ya zama nishaɗi, ba samun kuɗi ba. Kada ku taɓa yin hada-hadar fiye da yadda za ku iya yin asara. Idan caca yana shafar rayuwar ku, nemi taimako daga kungiyoyi irin su BeGambleAware ko Carawon Caca. mybetrecord baya sauƙaƙe sanya fare - yana taimaka muku fahimtar tarihin ku.
home.ctaTitle: Shirya don yin fare zuwa lamba?
home.ctaLead: Ƙirƙiri asusun kyauta kuma shiga fare na farko a cikin ƙasa da minti ɗaya.
home.footerCopy: © mybetrecord. Bincike da rikodi - ba shawarar caca ba.

meta.title: Blog - mybetrecord
meta.description: Jagora akan lidojin yin fare, ROI, ma'aunin Kelly, ƙimar layin rufewa, da nazarin fare wasanni.

blog.indexSub: Koyi lissafin da ke bayan ma'auni - sannan ku bi su a cikin littafin ku.
blog.ctaLead: Shiga fare, duba ROI da yawan amfanin ƙasa, da girman gungumomi tare da Kelly - asusun kyauta.
blog.rg: Cca mai alhakin. Abubuwan ilimi kawai - ba shawarwarin yin caca ba. Kada ku taɓa yin hada-hadar fiye da yadda za ku iya yin asara.

spreadsheet-vs-betting-tracker.title: Faɗakarwa vs Dedicated Betting Tracker
spreadsheet-vs-betting-tracker.description: Lokacin da Excel ya isa don rikodin fare ku - kuma lokacin da mai bin diddigi ya keɓance lokaci, kurakurai, da wuraren makafi.
spreadsheet-vs-betting-tracker.body:
Tattaunawa sune farkon farkon duniya don rikodin fare. Su ne 'yanci, sassauƙa, kuma saba. Masu cin amana da yawa ba sa barin su. Wasu kuma sun bugi bango - yawanci lokacin da sarƙaƙƙiya ta wuce sel da tsari.

Lokacin da maƙunsar bayanai ke aiki

  • Kasa da ~50 fare kowane wata
  • Wasanni ɗaya, kuɗi ɗaya, rashin daidaituwa na goma kawai
  • Sakamakon nasara/asara mai sauƙi, babu ko wace hanya ko hukumar musanya
  • Kuna jin daɗin kiyaye ƙididdiga

Inda maƙunsar bayanai ke karya

matsala Ciwon yatsa Amfanin Tracker Tsarin rashin daidaituwa Rukunin juyawa da hannu Daidaitawa ta atomatik Kowace hanya / EW Kuskure-mai saurin raba dabara Gin-ganin sulhu Girman Kelly Sake ginawa lokacin da bankin banki ya canza Shawarwari kai tsaye kowane fare CLV Ƙarin ginshiƙai, mai sauƙin tsallakewa Fiel akan kowane fare Labarai Tsarin tebur na Pivot Latsa ɗaya ta hanyar wasanni/tipster API / aiki da kai Rubutun masu rauni Maɓallan API na aji na farko Shigarwar wayar hannu Clunky Aikin gidan yanar gizo mai amsawa

Boyayyen farashi: lokaci

Minti goma a kowane mako gyaran ƙididdiga da kurakuran kwafi ya zarce farashin kayan aikin sadaukarwa ga duk wanda ke yin fare da gaske. Babban farashi shine mummunan yanke shawara daga munanan bayanai - wani fanni da aka shiga azaman asara, an manta da hukumar.

Hanyar Hijira

  1. Fitar da duk abin da kuke da shi (CSV yana da kyau)
  2. Shigo ko sake-maɓalli kwanan nan fare
  3. Guda a layi daya har tsawon makonni biyu - jimlar yakamata suyi daidai
  4. Janye maƙunsar bayanai lokacin da rahotanni suka yarda

Abin da bai kamata mai sa ido ya yi ba

Bai kamata ya sayar da zaɓe, yi wa ROI alkawari ba, ko maye gurbin horon banki. mybetrecord nazari ne da rikodi - maƙunsar da ba za ku iya karya ba da gangan.

A gwada duka gaskiya

Ajiye takardar ku wata ɗaya amma shiga sabon fare a cikin mybetrecord. Kwatanta ribar karshen wata da yawan amfanin ƙasa. Idan sun dace kuma mai sa ido ya adana lokaci, canza.

Fara kyauta: Ƙirƙiri asusu — babu katin da ake buƙata don fara shiga.

betting-equity-curve.title: Karanta Ƙwararren Ƙimar Kuɗi
betting-equity-curve.description: Matsakaicin ãdalci yana yin ƙirƙira tarin riba a kan lokaci. Koyi abin da siffofi ke nufi, dalilin da yasa ba a cire fare masu jiran gado, da kuma yadda ake tabo drift.
betting-equity-curve.body:
Hanyar ma'auniwani tsarin layi ne na tarin ribar (ko banki) bayan kowane fare ya daidaita, cikin tsari na zamani. Yana juya jadawalin sakamako ya zama labarin da za ku iya karantawa a kallo.

Kamar yadda lafiyayyen lankwasa yayi

Kyakkyawan gefen tare da haƙƙin haƙƙin haƙƙin haƙƙin haƙƙin haƙƙin haƙƙin haƙƙin haƙƙin haƙƙin haƙƙin haƙƙin haƙƙin haƙƙin haƙƙin haƙƙin haƙƙin haƙori tare da faɗuwa - ba madaidaiciyar layi ba. Gajeren lebur ko ƙasa bambance-bambance ne na al'ada; ci gaba da tafiya akan ku na iya nuna alamar lalacewa ko zamewar horo.

Surori masu lanƙwasa na gama gari

Tsarin niƙa - ƙananan gefuna, ƙananan bambance-bambancen wasanni (wasu kasuwannin musayar). gangara mai zurfi, ƙananan faɗuwa.

Maɗaukaki masu ƙarfi - manyan fayiloli masu tsayi da tsayi. Manyan juyi; ROI kadai ke yaudarar ba tare da mahallin gungume ba.

Daga dutsen - sau da yawa hannun jari yana ƙaruwa bayan zafi mai zafi (halayen da ba na Kelly ba) ko dabarun canza tsakiyar samfurin.

Wasan da ake jira

Bai kamata ma'aikatan da ba a daidaita su su bayyana akan madaidaicin ma'auni - ba su fahimci P/L ba tukuna. Ciki har da su yana buguwa ko kuma lalata layin a tatsuniya.

Bankin banki vs riba

Wasu sigogi suna tsara fara banki + riba mai yawa; wasu suna yin makircin riba kawai. Daidaita ginshiƙi tare da yadda kuke sarrafa kuɗi a hankali. Mybetrecord's ãdalci curve yana amfani da tsayayyen riba akan lokaci; banki a cikin ticker ya haɗa da daidaitawar bankin ku na farawa da P/L da aka gane.

Amfani da lankwasa bincike

  1. Ka yi alama dabarun canje-canje akan tsarin lokaci (sabon wasanni, sabon mai ba da shawara)
  2. Kwatanta gangara mai lankwasa kafin/bayan canji
  3. Matsakaicin hannun jari mai rufi - shin bambance-bambancen ne ke tafiyar da hannun jari ko kuma a gefe?

Haɗa tare da wasu ma'auni

Matsakaicin daidaito yana kwance ta hanyar tsallakewa idan kun yi watsi da CLV, yawan amfanin ƙasa, da girman samfurin. Yi amfani da lanƙwasa don fahimta; yi amfani da teburi don yanke shawara.

Duba tsarin daidaiton ku a cikin rahotannin mybetrecord bayan shiga wasu ƴan gyare-gyaren fare.

each-way-bet-settlement.title: An Bayyana Matsalolin Fatar Kowacce Hanya
each-way-bet-settlement.description: Yadda fare ta kowace hanya ta biya akan nasara da sanya sassan. Misalai masu aiki tare da ɓangarorin wuri da ƙa'idodin zafin zafi.
each-way-bet-settlement.body:
Kowace hanya fare fare biyu ne a cikin ɗaya: rabin hannun jari akan zaɓi don cin nasara, rabi akansa don sanya (gama a wuraren kowane sharuddan littafi). Math ɗin daidaitawa yana ɗaukar maƙunsar bayanai da yawa.

Tsarin

Jimlar hannun jari S ya rabu:

  • Kashi na nasara: S/2 a cikin rashin nasara
  • Kashi na wuri: S/2 a daidai wuri

Matsalar wuri = 1 + (nasara - 1) × Rashin wuri

Rashin yanki na gama gari: 1/4 ko 1/5 na rashin daidaiton nasara.

Misali - mai nasara

£20 kowane-way (£10 nasara + £10 wuri) a 10.00 nasara rashin daidaito, 1/4 sharuddan wuri.

  • Kashi na nasara yana biya: 10 × £10 = dawowar £100 (ribar £90)
  • Sauran wuri: 1 + (10 - 1) × 0.25 = 3.25 → 3.25 × £10 = dawowar £32.50 (ribar £22.50)
  • Jimlar riba = £90 + £22.50 = £112.50

Misali - an sanya shi kawai

Fare iri ɗaya, doki ya ƙare na biyu (wuraren da ake biya, babu nasara):

  • Gashin nasara ya yi hasarar: -£10
  • Kashi na wuri ya ci nasara: Ribar £22.50 kamar yadda yake sama
  • Ribar yanar gizo = £12.50

Misali - ba a sanya shi ba

Dukansu sassan sun rasa: - £20 (cikakken hannun jari).

Musanya da lokuta na musamman

Musanya sau da yawa ke raba nasara da sanya kasuwanni - ba tikitin kowane hanya ba. Matattu zafi yana rage dawowar wuri. Ana amfani da ragi na doka 4 akan sassan nasara na tsere.

Koyaushe yin rikodin kowane_way=gaskiya da place_fraction a cikin littafin ku don haka software tana amfani da dabara iri ɗaya kowane lokaci.

bi kowane hanya a cikin mybetrecord

Sauya kowace hanya akan shigarwar fare, saita juzu'in wuri, kuma bari sasantawa ta sake ƙididdige riba lokacin da kuka yi alamar nasara/asara/sakamakon sakamako.

odds-formats-decimal-american-fractional.title: Matsalolin rashin daidaituwa - Decimal, American, da Fractional
odds-formats-decimal-american-fractional.description: Canza tsakanin ƙima, Amurkawa, da rashin daidaituwa. Teburin magana da dabaru don tsarin Hong Kong, Malaysian, da Indonesiya.
odds-formats-decimal-american-fractional.body:
Masu yin littattafai a duk duniya suna nuna farashi daban. Ƙididdigar ladabi tana adana ɗayacanonical decimal a ciki yayin da yake ba ku damar shigar da fare a kowane tsari da kuke gani akan allo.

Decimal (Turai)

Jimlar dawo da hannun jarin raka'a gami da hannun jari. Decimal 2.50 → cin riba £1.50 akan £1 hannun jari.

Riba = gungumen azaba × (dicimal - 1)

Ba'amurke (layin kuɗi)

Kyakkyawan (+150): riba akan gungumen azaba akan £100. +150 → decimal 2.50.

Korau (-200): ana buƙatar hannun jari don cin nasara £100. −200 → decimal 1.50.

Juya:

  • Idan Ba'amurke > 0: decimal = 1 + American/100
  • Idan Ba'amurke < 0: decimal = 1 + 100/ | Ba'amurke|

Rashi (Birtaniya)

6/4 yana nufin cin nasara £6 akan kowane £4 da aka saka. Decimal = 1 + lamba/mai ƙima = 2.50.

Wasu shafuka suna nuna “6/4” a matsayin kashi na nasara kawai; ko da yaushe tabbatar da ko an haɗa hannun jari a nuni.

Tsarin Asiya

Format Misali Decimal Hong Kong 0.85 1.85 Malaysiya + 0.85 1.85 Malaysiya - -0.85 1 + 1/0.85 ≈ 2.176 Indonesiyan + 1.50 2.50 Indonesiyan - -1.50 1 + 1/1.50 ≈ 1.667

Me yasa daidaita al'amura

Haɗin tsarin a cikin maƙunsar rubutu ɗaya yana haifar da kurakuran shiru - alamomin ragi na Amurka, ma'auni na juzu'i, ko ɗaukar HK azaman ƙima. Software ya kamata ya canza akan shigarwa kuma kada ya rasa daidaito.

Kwarai mai amfani

Sai tsarin shigar da tsoho a cikin maballin ku wanda ya dace da mai yin littafin ku na farko, amma tabbatar da daidai gwargwado akan adanawa har sai al'adar ta tsaya.

mybetrecord yana karɓar duk tsarin da aka jera kuma yana adana ƙima ga kowane rahoto da lissafin Kelly.

closing-line-value-clv.title: Ƙimar Layi na Rufe (CLV) - Me yasa Sharp Bettors Bin sa
closing-line-value-clv.description: Ƙimar ƙimar layin rufewa ko kun doke farashin kasuwa na ƙarshe. Koyi yadda ake lissafin CLV da dalilin da yasa yake tsinkayar fasaha na dogon lokaci.
closing-line-value-clv.body:
Kimar layin rufe (CLV) yana kwatanta rashin daidaiton da kuka ɗauka da rashin daidaiton da ake samu lokacin da kasuwa ta rufe (yawanci farawa ko tsere). Yin nasara a kai a kai yana ɗaya daga cikin mafi ƙarfin hasashen samun riba na dogon lokaci - ya fi ƙarfi fiye da wata mai sa'a P/L.

Me yasa layin rufe yake da mahimmanci

Tarin bayanan kasuwa. Farashin rufewa yana nuna mafi kyawun ƙima kafin taron. Idan kuna samun 2.10 akai-akai lokacin da ƙarshen ya kasance 2.00, kuna samun ƙima kafin kasuwa ta gyara.

Kididdigar CLV

Ma'anar gama gari:

CLV % = (matsakaicin adadin ku ÷ rufewar ƙima - 1) × 100%

Misali: kun yi fare a 2.20, kusa ya kasance 2.00.

CLV = (2.20 ÷ 2.00 - 1) × 100 = +10%

CLV mara kyau yana nufin kun ɗauki mafi muni fiye da na kusa - ko da fare mai nasara na iya zama mummunan tsari.

CLV vs sakamako

Bambanci yana ɓoye fasaha akan ƙananan samfurori. Kuna iya yin asarar kuɗi tare da tabbataccen CLV na makonni, ko kuma ku ci nasara tare da CLV mara kyau akan mai zafi. Bibiyar CLV sama da ɗaruruwan fare don yin hukunci akan tsari.

Abin da za a yi rikodin

Ga kowane fare, adana:

  • Abin da kuka ɗauka (kowane tsari)
  • Rage rashin daidaito (kasuwa ɗaya, zaɓi iri ɗaya)
  • Tambarin lokaci idan layi yana motsawa cikin rana

Rufewar musayar ya bambanta da littafin mai laushi - ku tsaya a cikin tsarin bayanan ku.

Iyakoki

  • Layin rufewa ba gaskiya ba ne - motsin tururi yana iya zama kuskure kuma
  • Hanyoyin haɓakawa da haɓaka karkatattun kwatance
  • Ƙananan kasuwanni suna da hayaniya ta rufe

Yi amfani da CLV a cikin mybetrecord

Ƙara rashin daidaituwa na rufewa akan shigarwa ko gyara. Rahotanni na iya bayyana matsakaita CLV tare da ROI don haka ku raba sa'a daga gefen.

kelly-criterion-explained.title: Kelly Criterion ya bayyana don Bettors
kelly-criterion-explained.description: Ma'aunin ma'aunin Kelly yana da girma daga gefe da rashin daidaituwa. Koyi dabarar, ɓangarorin Kelly, da misalin lamba da zaku iya tantancewa.
kelly-criterion-explained.body:
Ma'aunin Kelly yana amsa tambaya ɗaya: idan aka yi la'akari da ƙimar ku, wane yanki na banki ya kamata ku bayar don haɓaka haɓaka na dogon lokaci - ba tare da haɗarin lalacewa daga mummunan gudu ba?

Tsarin ƙididdiga (ƙimar ƙima)

Don ƙima na ƙima O kuma cin nasara p:

Kelly fraction = (O × p - 1) / (O - 1)

Stake = Kelly juzu'in × bankroll (sau da yawa ana ninka ta hanyar aminci).

Misali na lamba

Kun yi imani cewa ƙungiya tana da damar kashi 55% don yin nasara akan ƙima 2.00 (har da kuɗi).

  • p = 0.55, O = 2.0
  • Kelly = (2.0 × 0.55 - 1) / (2.0 - 1) = 0.10 / 1.0 = 10% na banki
Akan £1,000 na banki, cikakken Kelly yana ba da shawarar £ 100. Yawancin masu cin amana suna amfani da rabin Kelly (5%, £50) kokwata Kellydon rage bambance-bambance.

Edge daga fa'idar rashin daidaituwa

Idan “adal” Farashin shine 1.91 (wanda aka nuna 52.4%) kuma kuna samun 2.00 (wanda aka nuna 50%), kuna da kyakkyawan gefen. Kelly ya canza wannan gefen tare da bayar da ƙima zuwa girman hannun jari.

Me yasa ba koyaushe ke cika Kelly ba?

Cikakken Kelly yana haɓaka haɓakar geometric a ka'idar. A aikace:

  • Kididdigar ku ta p ba daidai ba ne sau da yawa fiye da yadda kuke zato
  • Fare na lokaci ɗaya yana daidaita ( league ɗaya, rana ɗaya)
  • Tsarin tunani yana haifar da watsi da tsarin

Fracal Kelly (0.25-0.5×) daidai yake tsakanin ƙwararrun masu cin amana.

Kurakurai na yau da kullun

  • Yin amfani da Kelly lokacin da ba ku da kiyasin gaske
  • Aika Kelly zuwa abubuwan da suka dace a matsayin abubuwan da suka faru masu zaman kansu
  • Yin watsi da bankin banki wanda ba da gaske ba ne & ldquo; babban haɗari”

Bibiyar Kelly a cikin mybetrecord Saita bankroll da Kelly multiplier a cikin saituna. Shigar da rashin daidaituwa na sirri akan kowane fare don ganin shawarar da aka ba da shawarar tare da ainihin gungumen ku - duba lafiya, ba umarni ba.

roi-vs-yield-sports-betting.title: ROI vs Haɓaka Haɓaka a Wasan Wasanni
roi-vs-yield-sports-betting.description: ROI da yawan amfanin ƙasa suna auna aikin yin fare daban. Koyi dabarar, misalan aiki, da lokacin amfani da kowane awo.
roi-vs-yield-sports-betting.body:
ROI (komawa kan saka hannun jari) da samarwasu ne manyan kanun labaran lambobi biyu. Suna da alaƙa amma ba za a iya musanya su ba - yin amfani da wanda bai dace ba na iya sa hutu-ko da wata ya zama kamar bala'i, ko akasin haka.

Ma'anar

ROI = jimlar riba ÷ jimlar hannun jari × 100%

Haɓaka = jimlar riba ÷ jimlar yawan canji × 100%

Ga mai yin fare-fare wanda bai taɓa ƙara girma ba, jujjuyawar ta yi daidai da hannun jari kuma lambobin sun daidaita. Da zarar hannun jari ya bambanta - girman Kelly, haɗawa, ko gaurayawan raka'a - sun bambanta.

Misali na aiki

A ce sama da 10 da aka daidaita fare kun saka £100 kowane lokaci (jimlar hannun jarin £1,000) kuma kun sami riba £50.

  • ROI = 50 ÷ 1,000 × 100 = 5%
  • Haɓaka = 50 ÷ 1,000 × 100 = 5%

Yanzu a ce fare ɗaya ya kasance £500 sauran kuma £50 (jimlar hannun jarin £950), ribar £50 iri ɗaya:

  • ROI = 50 ÷ 950 × 100 ≈ 5.3%
  • Har yanzu yana nuna jujjuyawar da aka samu ta hanya ɗaya idan juzu'i = hannun jari

Riki yakan bayyana lokacin da mutane suka haxaROI na banki (riba ÷ fara banki) da ROIshake. Koyaushe yiwa lakabin ma'ana wanda kuke nufi.

Lokacin da za a yi amfani da ROI

ROI a kan gungumomi amsoshin: “ Ga kowane fam na kasada, nawa ya dawo?” Yana da kyau don kwatanta dabaru tare da tsarin hannun jari iri ɗaya.

Lokacin da za a yi amfani da yawan amfanin ƙasa

Haɓaka kan canji ya zama ruwan dare a cikin rahotannin masana'antu da tantance masu ba da shawara. Yana mai da hankali kan iya aiki a kowace naúrar wagered ba tare da la'akari da girman banki ba.

Yajin aikin bai isa ba

Adadin yajin aikin 60% a matsakaicin rashin daidaito 1.50 yana asarar kuɗi. Haɗa ROI/sakamako tare da matsakaita rashin daidaituwa da CLV don ganin ko gefen gaske ne ko bambance-bambance.

Aiki mai amfani

Zaɓi ma'auni na firamare ɗaya kuma ku manne da shi kowace shekara. mybetrecord yana ba da rahoton duka riba da yawan riba akan fare da aka daidaita ta yadda zaku iya daidaitawa da kowane ma'auni na tsarin ku na amfani.

what-is-a-betting-ledger.title: Menene Ledger Betting?
what-is-a-betting-ledger.description: Littafin yin fare rikodin tsari ne na kowane wager da kuka sanya. Koyi dalilin da yasa masu cin amana masu ladabtarwa suke kiyaye ɗaya da abin da za a bi.
what-is-a-betting-ledger.body:
ALittafin yin fare shine kawai cikakken, rikodin tarihin ku na wagers: abin da kuka goyi baya, menene rashin daidaituwa, nawa, da yadda aka daidaita. Ka yi la'akari da shi a matsayin bambanci tsakanin hasashen ko kun gama kakar wasa da sani.

Me yasa marubutu suka gaza

Yawancin masu cin amana suna farawa a cikin Excel ko Google Sheets. Wannan yana aiki har zuwa:

  • Formula suna karya lokacin da kuka ƙara kowane-hanyoyi ko musanya ginshiƙan hukumar
  • Kuna mantawa da shiga fanko ko tsabar kuɗi
  • Ba za ku iya yanke ta hanyar mai ba da shawara ko wasa ba tare da sake gina teburin pivot

Littafin sadaukarwa yana daidaita daidaito, yana lissafin riba akan kowane gyara, kuma yana kiyaye rahotanni daidai gwargwado.

Abin da za a yi rikodin

Aƙalla, shiga:

  1. Tattaunawa da zaɓi - isassun cikakkun bayanai don gane fare watanni daga baya
  2. Ske da currency
  3. Sauran(a kowane irin tsari da littafin ya nuna)
  4. Sakamako — yana jiran, nasara, asara, banza
  5. Ribar da aka daidaita - ko bari software ta samo shi daga ka'idojin sakamako

Filayen ci gaba waɗanda ke raba masu bin diddigin kaifi da masu ɗaukar rubutu na yau da kullun:

  • Rashin daidaituwa na sirri (farashin ku na gaskiya)
  • Matsalolin rufewa (na CLV)
  • Tipster ko tushen abin ƙira
  • Mai yin littafi da kwamishina

Ledger vs jarida

Mutane suna amfani da “mujallar betting” da & ldquo;littafin yin fare” musanya. A taƙaice, jarida na iya haɗawa da bayanan ba da labari (“ji gaggauce”, & ldquo;layi motsi”); littafi yana jaddada lambobi. Mafi kyawun kayan aikin sun haɗa duka biyu: bayanan da aka tsara tare da bayanan rubutu kyauta kowane fare.

Wane ne yake buƙatar ɗaya?

Duk wanda ya ɗauki yin fare azaman wasan fasaha maimakon tikitin caca:

  • Waɗanda suka dace da masu cin amana suna bin diddigin cancanta da fare kyauta
  • Yan kasuwan musanya suna auna madaidaicin yawan amfanin gona
  • Mabiyan Tipster suna tabbatar da tallan ROI
  • Masu wasa na nishaɗi waɗanda ke son sarrafa banki na gaskiya

Farawa

Zaɓi nau'in wasa ɗaya ko nau'in kasuwa sannan ku shiga fare 20 na gaba ba tare da canza tsarin ku ba. Bitar adadin yajin aiki, matsakaicin rashin daidaito, da riba ta mako. Wannan tushen yana da daraja fiye da kowane tukwici.

Bibi da wannan a cikin mybetrecord: ƙirƙirar asusun kyauta, saita bankin ku da tsarin rashin daidaituwa, sannan ku shiga fare na farko cikin ƙasa da minti ɗaya.

promoStats.notFound: Ba a iya samun wannan shafin ƙididdiga na talla ba.
